title: InFood
description: Adds food items crafted by using a new ore called sulfur. These food items never run out
body:
# What does the InFood mod add?
The InFood (Infinite Food) mod adds food items that last forever crafted using sulfur

## What is sulfur?
Sulfur is a new material found underground in the new SulfurLand caves biome
Sulfur can also be turned into a liquid called Sulfuric Acid by placing it into a crfating table with a bucket. Sulfuric Acid can be used as a fuel source that can smelt a stack of items

## How do you get the new foods?
You get the new foods by combining certain items with sulfur
Currently the items thta you can combine with sulfur, those being:
- Steak, gotten by combining steak and sulfur
- Potatoes, gotten by compressing potatoes into blocks and combining with Tater Packaging in a crafting table
- A new item, Sausages, gotten by defeating a new boss, Keir Starmer (AKA the prime minister of the UK) who you find in Village Raids

## Additional info
I made this entire mod in MCreator in 1 day so it may not be of the highest quality
